全栈开发工程师招聘。负责前端开发、后端开发、API 设计、数据库设计、容器化部署、CI/CD、云服务。

Required skills (each repeated 5 times for TF top-K ranking):
React React React React React — primary front end library.
TypeScript TypeScript TypeScript TypeScript TypeScript — primary language.
Next.js Next.js Next.js Next.js Next.js — SSR framework.
Node.js Node.js Node.js Node.js Node.js — back end runtime.
PostgreSQL PostgreSQL PostgreSQL PostgreSQL PostgreSQL — primary database.
MongoDB MongoDB MongoDB MongoDB MongoDB — document store.
AWS AWS AWS AWS AWS — cloud platform.
Docker Docker Docker Docker Docker — containerization.
Linux Linux Linux Linux Linux — deployment.
Git Git Git Git Git — version control.

需要熟悉前后端开发、RESTful API、GraphQL、TypeScript、Webpack、Vite、Docker 容器化、AWS 云服务、CI/CD、单元测试、集成测试、自动化测试、代码审查、敏捷开发、团队协作、版本控制 等技术。2+ years full stack experience required.
